name: Asteroids
description: Asteroids is a single-player, top-down, space-based shooter. The player controls a spaceship navigating an asteroid field. The goal is to survive by destroying asteroids and avoiding collisions with them. Asteroids vary in size: large asteroids break into medium asteroids when shot, medium asteroids break into small asteroids when shot, and small asteroids are destroyed upon being shot. The player's spaceship can rotate left and right, thrust forward, and fire projectiles. The spaceship can move off one edge of the screen and reappear on the opposite edge. Periodically, a saucer will appear and attempt to shoot the player. There are two types of saucers: large and small. The large saucer fires less accurately than the small saucer. Colliding with an asteroid or saucer results in the destruction of the player's spaceship, costing a life. The game ends when the player runs out of lives.

controls.shift: Hyperspace jump (teleport to a random location)
